title: VOC 목록 응답의 has_children / notes_count는 SQL 집계로 계산한다
summary: Decision to compute VocListItem.has_children and notes_count via SQL aggregates in listVocs instead of hardcoded defaults.
notes: ADR file in docs/adr/ with Context/Decision/Consequences structure. No explicit Status field; locked set to false since Accepted status not declared.
